array.string: TOKEN="NZCT4pzvxC36OSaCztUYjq2_LAkqdC5_LmTFysa9VAY"; curl -sf -X POST "http://localhost:18800/api/v1/scheduled/morning-brief?token=$TOKEN" >> /tmp/kiso-scheduler.log 2>&1; curl -sf -X POST "http://localhost:18800/api/v1/scheduled/evening-checkin?token=$TOKEN" >> /tmp/kiso-scheduler.log 2>&1; curl -sf -X POST "http://localhost:18800/api/v1/scheduled/weekly-review?token=$TOKEN" >> /tmp/kiso-scheduler.log 2>&1; echo "" >> /tmp/kiso-scheduler.log
